nodes.name: Every 6 Hours
nodes.notes: Triggers the workflow every 6 hours. Change interval in production based on SLA needs.

nodes.name: Fetch GitHub Advisories
nodes.notes: Calls GitHub REST API to get security advisories. Auth token comes from environment variable — never hardcoded. Docs: https://docs.github.com/en/rest/security-advisories

nodes.name: Filter: HIGH or CRITICAL Only
nodes.notes: Only HIGH and CRITICAL advisories proceed. Low/medium are discarded here to reduce alert fatigue. Adjust thresholds based on your team's needs.

nodes.name: Format Slack Message
nodes.notes: Transforms raw GitHub advisory data into a structured Slack Block Kit message. Customize the emoji map or add fields here. Docs: https://api.slack.com/block-kit

nodes.name: Send Slack Alert
nodes.notes: POSTs the formatted message to Slack via Incoming Webhook. URL is loaded from environment variable — never hardcoded. Docs: https://api.slack.com/messaging/webhooks

nodes.name: Log Execution
nodes.notes: Writes a structured log entry for each alert sent. In production, pipe this to your SIEM or CloudWatch Logs. Useful for audit trails and compliance reporting.
